---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)

data(mtcars)
data("epilepsy")
```

```{r}
mtcars %>% select(mpg, disp, wt) %>% cor() %>% round(2)
```

```{r}
contr.helmert(5)
```
```{r}
fwd_helmert = function(a){
  contr = matrix(0.0, nrow = a, ncol = a - 1)
  for(cl in 1:(a-1)){
    n = a - cl + 1
    contr[cl, cl] = (n-1)/n
    contr[(cl+1):a, cl] = -1/n
  }
  return(contr)
}

contr_banova = function(a){
  contr = fwd_helmert(a)
  for(cl in 1:(a-1)){
    contr[,cl] = contr[,cl]/sqrt(sum(contr[,cl]^2))
  }
  return(contr)
}
```

```{r}
fwd_helmert(5)
```
```{r}
contr_banova(5)
```
```{r}
a = 4
Q = contr_banova(a)
round(Q%*%diag(a-1)%*%t(Q), 2) %>% print()
I = diag(a)
J = matrix(1.0, nrow = a, ncol = a)
round(I - J/a, 2) %>% print()
```
```{r}
data("penguins")
levels(penguins$island)

```

```{r}
nc = length(levels(penguins$island)) - 1
contrasts(penguins$island) = contr_banova(nc + 1)
contrasts(penguins$island)
X = model.matrix(~ flipper_len + island, data = na.omit(penguins))
head(X)
colMeans(X)
```

```{r}
stancode(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + island, 
         data = na.omit(penguins),
         prior = set_prior("normal(0, 2)", class = "b", coef = paste0("island", 1:nc)) + set_prior("multi_student_t_lpdf(b | 1, rep_vector(0.0, 2), r * sigma^2 * diag(2))", class = "b")
         )
```


```{r}
X = model.matrix(~ disp + wt - 1, data = mtcars) %>% scale(center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)
N = nrow(X)
V = solve(t(X)%*%X/N)
V
```


```{r}
fit <- brm_jzs(mpg ~ disp + wt,
               #mpg ~ disp + wt + disp:wt, 
               data = mtcars, 
               family = gaussian(),
               #r = sqrt(2)/4,
               r = 1,
               iter = 10000,
               )
```

```{r}
stancode(fit)
```

```{r}
# IT LOOKS LIKE THE PRIOR SCALE ("r") ISN'T AFFECTING THE BFS
# LOOK INTO THIS
result = inc_tests(fit)
print(result$inc_table)
```
```{r}
print(result$model_table)
```

```{r}
result_comp = regressionBF(mpg ~ disp + wt, data = mtcars, rscaleCont = 1)
result_comp/result_comp[3]
```
